name: sgs/product-card
title: Product Card
description: Product card with pack-size variant pills, price and CTA. Typed mode = built-in elements authored directly from block attributes (no InnerBlocks). Live product data mode = render a live WooCommerce or SGS product (price, image, stock, add-to-cart) through the SGS design.

featuredTag.description: Tag text for featured variant (e.g. Most popular, Best selling, Flagship product). Mirror of trialTag for the featured variant. Rendered as a coloured strip above the card content when variantStyle='featured'.

ctaColourBackground.description: Built-in CTA background colour override. EMPTY (default) = inherit the shared button-preset channel via the sgs-button--{style} class (so a --secondary/--outline CTA gets its transparent background, a --primary gets the solid fill — mirroring a standalone sgs/button). Set a token slug or raw colour only to override.

ctaColourText.description: Built-in CTA text colour override. EMPTY (default) = inherit the shared button-preset colour channel via the sgs-button--{style} class (composite-mirror, WCAG-correct per client — a light-primary palette gets dark CTA text automatically). Set a theme token slug or raw CSS colour only to override. (Was 'text-inverse', which force-painted near-white and failed WCAG on light palettes — D-pending.)

ctaColourBorder.description: Built-in CTA border colour override. EMPTY (default) = inherit the shared button-preset channel via the sgs-button--{style} class. Set only to override.

ctaColourBackgroundHover.description: Built-in CTA hover background colour override. EMPTY (default) = inherit the shared button-preset hover channel via the sgs-button--{style} class. Set only to override.

ctaColourTextHover.description: Built-in CTA hover text colour override. EMPTY (default) = inherit the shared button-preset hover colour channel via the sgs-button--{style} class. Set only to override. (Was 'text-inverse' — WCAG footgun on light palettes.)

ctaColourBorderHover.description: Built-in CTA hover border colour override. EMPTY (default) = inherit the shared button-preset hover channel via the sgs-button--{style} class. Set only to override.

ctaWidthType.description: 'full' stretches the built-in CTA (.product-card__view / .product-card__add-to-cart) to 100% width.

cardMaxWidth.description: Override the card max-width (e.g. 320px, 100%). Empty = use theme default (380px). Sets --sgs-product-card-max-width inline.

imageHeight.description: Override the product image box height (e.g. 180px, 16rem). Empty = use theme default (220px). Sets --sgs-product-card-image-height inline.

innerPadding.description: Inner padding of the card body (ContainerWrapperControls content-kind Spacing panel). A numeric spacing-preset slug (e.g. "40") resolves to var(--wp--preset--spacing--40); a raw CSS length (e.g. "24px") is emitted directly. Empty = theme default (20px). Sets --sgs-product-card-inner-padding inline.

indexVariationUrl.description: FR-27-E2 escape-hatch: set to a variation ID to override the page canonical URL to that variation's URL, enabling it to be indexed. 0 = default (WP core canonical, recommended).

framingMode.description: Spec 28 P1 (FR-28-8): how the comparative value-ladder frames the per-unit saving. loss-aversion = 'save Xp each vs …'; savings = 'save X%'; neutral = no saving text. Placement-level (a card block renders many products).

decoyEnabled.description: Spec 28 P1 (FR-28-9a): when true, the 'Best value' badge targets the 2nd-largest pack (decoy) instead of the largest. In live-data mode the per-product meta _sgs_decoy_enabled overrides this.

headingLevel.description: HTML heading level for the product title in typed built-in mode (h2, h3, or h4).

ctaBehaviour.description: Primary CTA behaviour in bound mode. 'learn-more' = plain link. 'add-to-basket' = SGS cart proxy add. 'buy-now' = add then redirect to WC checkout. Typed mode always renders plain links regardless of this setting.

ctaStyle.description: Primary CTA visual style (primary/secondary/outline) — maps to the sgs-button--{ctaStyle} modifier class, mirroring a standalone sgs/button's inheritStyle. The cloning converter lifts the draft CTA's --modifier here (Spec 31 §13.5). Picking a style in the editor also seeds the ctaColour*/ctaBorder*/ctaFontWeight fields; leaving those empty makes the CTA inherit the shared button-preset colour channel (composite-mirror, WCAG-correct per client).

cta2Text.description: Secondary CTA label. Empty string = no secondary button rendered.

cta2Style.description: Secondary CTA visual style — maps to btn-{cta2Style} class.

visibleAxes.description: Bound mode only: taxonomy slugs of attribute axes to show in the option picker. Empty array = show all axes. Display filter only — never alters the seeded context or manifest.

overrideElements.description: Connected (bound) mode only: which card elements render the operator's typed value instead of the live product value. Members: 'name','description','badge','image','cta'. An element's typed value is preserved when its override is off; an empty typed value never blanks the card (live value renders). PRICE IS NEVER OVERRIDABLE (page-schema-feed parity) - deliberately not an enum member.

showLadder.description: Show the comparative per-pack price ladder. The grid block sets this false on its cards by default - browsing context shows just price + per-item note.

pickerLabelFontSize.description: Bound/configurator mode only: font-size for the in-card option-picker labels (Size/Flavour legends). Raw CSS size (e.g. 18px, 1.2rem). Empty = default. Forwarded to each sgs/option-picker as labelFontSize.

pickerLabelColour.description: Bound/configurator mode only: colour for the in-card option-picker labels (Size/Flavour legends). Theme colour token slug (e.g. primary) or raw hex. Empty = default. Forwarded to each sgs/option-picker as labelColour.

pickerColourPreset.description: Colour preset forwarded to each in-card sgs/option-picker as colourPreset. Default 'solid' preserves the pre-2026-07-10 bound-configurator look (primary border resting, solid-primary fill selected) now that the card no longer hardcodes the picker's border colour (R5 — see product-card/style.css).

pickerShowSelectedTick.description: Forwarded to each in-card sgs/option-picker as showSelectedTick.

pickerPillBgColour.description: Forwarded to each in-card sgs/option-picker as pillBgColour (resting pill background).

pickerPillTextColour.description: Forwarded to each in-card sgs/option-picker as pillTextColour (resting pill text).

pickerPillBorderColour.description: Forwarded to each in-card sgs/option-picker as pillBorderColour (resting pill border).

pickerPillBorderRadius.description: Forwarded to each in-card sgs/option-picker as pillBorderRadius. CSS length string (e.g. 6px); empty = the option-picker's own default.

pickerPillSelectedBgColour.description: Forwarded to each in-card sgs/option-picker as pillSelectedBgColour.

pickerPillSelectedTextColour.description: Forwarded to each in-card sgs/option-picker as pillSelectedTextColour.

pickerPillSelectedBorderColour.description: Forwarded to each in-card sgs/option-picker as pillSelectedBorderColour (R2 decoupled selected border).

pickerPillSelectedBorderRadius.description: Forwarded to each in-card sgs/option-picker as pillSelectedBorderRadius. CSS length string (e.g. 6px); empty = match the resting pill radius.

titleColour.description: Colour for the product title heading. Theme token slug or raw hex. Empty = theme default.

priceColour.description: Colour for the price element. Theme token slug or raw hex. Empty = theme default.

descColour.description: Colour for the product description text. Theme token slug or raw hex. Empty = theme default.

priceNoteColour.description: Colour for the price-note text. Theme token slug or raw hex. Empty = theme default (muted).

tagPadding.description: Box padding for the in-body trial tag { top, right, bottom, left }. Rendered scoped via the shared sgs_label_box_css_rule() helper (mirrors sgs/label). The cloning converter lifts the draft .sgs-product-card__tag--trial padding here.

tagBackgroundColour.description: Background colour for the in-body trial tag. Theme token slug or raw CSS colour. Empty = the style.css default (accent tint). Cloning converter lifts the draft trial-tag background-color here.

tagTextColour.description: Text colour for the in-body trial tag. Theme token slug or raw CSS colour. Empty = the style.css default. Cloning converter lifts the draft trial-tag color here.

tagBorderRadius.description: Border radius (px) for the in-body trial tag. 0 = the style.css default. Cloning converter lifts the draft trial-tag border-radius here.

tagFullWidth.description: When true the in-body trial tag stretches to full width (block, 100%) instead of hugging its text. Defaults TRUE because the trial tag is a full-width child of the flex-column card body by design (draft canon) — a card-design constant, not a converter-detected value (the parent-flex fullWidth heuristic was dropped per council). Toggle off to make the trial tag hug its text.

showPickers.description: Bound/live-data mode only: when false, suppresses all option-picker renders (both variable-axis and non-variable pill paths) and falls through to the static From-price card appearance. Use on collection grids where picker UI is unwanted. Default true (existing behaviour unchanged).

attributes.description: A short product description goes here.
